english_query: If the bread has risen, then the yeast was alive. The bread has not risen. Therefore, the yeast was not alive. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.

From that we can only say that the if part is not true but the line does not tell us what happen when the food does not rise. So we can not be sure the tiny living thing was not alive. The last line does not follow for sure. does not follow

english_query: If the meeting starts at noon, then everyone arrives before noon. If everyone arrives before noon, then the bank is flooded. Therefore, if the meeting starts at noon, then the bank is flooded. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says if the meeting starts at the middle of the day, then everyone gets there before that time. Next, we look at the second idea. It says if everyone gets there before that time, then the bank has too much water. Now we want to know if the last idea follows. The last idea says if the meeting starts at the middle of the day, then the bank has too much water. We can see a line of thought here. If the meeting starts at the middle of the day, the first idea tells us everyone gets there before that time. Then, because everyone gets there before that time, the second idea tells us the bank has too much water. So, if the meeting starts at the middle of the day, the bank must have too much water. There is no way for the early ideas to be true and the last idea to be wrong. If you agree with the first two parts, you must agree with the last part. It follows for sure. follows

english_query: the problem with thinking you know more than you really do
ugf_response:
Person 1: Why do some people think they know a lot when they really know very little?

Person 2: This happens because when a person knows just a tiny bit, they do not see how much is left to learn. They feel sure because they have not seen the hard parts yet.

Person 1: So being a little bit good at thinking makes you feel too sure of yourself?

Person 2: Yes, that is right. It is like standing in a small pool of water. You can see the bottom and think you know the whole big sea. But if you go deeper, you see how big and dark it is.

Person 1: What happens when they learn more then?

Person 2: As they learn more, they start to see how much they do not know. They realize the thing they are learning about is big and has many parts that fit together in hard ways. This makes them feel less sure, which is actually a good sign of real learning.

Person 1: Does this mean the people who are very good at something are not sure?

Person 2: Often, yes. The ones who know the most see all the small points and the things that are still not clear. They know the end of what they can do. So they speak with care and admit when they might be wrong.

english_query: Either the package arrives today or the package arrives tomorrow. The package does not arrive today. Therefore, the package arrives tomorrow. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we notice the first idea says one of two things must happen: the box comes today or it comes tomorrow. Next, we see the second idea tells us the box does not come today. Since the first idea says it has to be one or the other, and we know it is not today, the only choice left is that it comes tomorrow. So this means the last idea follows for sure. follows

english_query: Also, every cut is made by things that are against each other. But these three do not seem to be against each other. For the good is nice to have, and no bad thing is good for us. But this should not be true if the cut was by things against each other, for then the good and the good-for-us would be against each other. And the old teacher talks about this. So this cut is wrong.
ugf_response: This cut is not by things that are against each other, but by ways of looking at them. Now we call things nice to have if they are wanted only because they feel good, even if they hurt or are not good. But the good-for-us is for things that are not wanted for themselves, but only because they help get something else, like drinking a drink that feels bad in the mouth but helps the body. While the good is said of things that are wanted for themselves.

english_query: why the rules should be the same for everyone
ugf_response:
Person number one: Why must we have the same ways of doing things for every person?

Person number two: If we have one set of ways that stays the same for all, then no one can get more than another person just because they are rich or strong.

Person number one: But what if some people are different? Does it not make sense to have different ways for different people?

Person number two: If we change the ways for some, then the people in power can pick who gets the easy way and who gets the hard way. This makes it so that the way things work is not what everyone should get.

Person number one: I see. So you are saying that if the ways are not the same, then the people with the most power will use them to hurt others?

Person number two: Yes. When the ways are the same for everyone, every person can know what to expect. It makes the world a place where we can trust that the ways will not change just to help one person and hurt another.

english_query: how the kind of person you are matters more than following rules
ugf_response: First, we see that a set of words that tell us what to do in a certain case can be followed by a person just by reading those words and doing what they say. Then, we think about what makes a person good and we find that a person is made of many parts such as how they feel, how they think, how they act and how they care about what is right for others. Next, we notice that a set of words that tell us what to do may not fit every situation because the world can change and because the words may have been made by people who did not see everything. Then, we see that a person who cares about what is right can look at those words and ask if they fit the real need and can decide to change or bend the words when it would hurt or be not right. After that, we see that this caring and thinking is more important than just doing the words because it can keep people safe and can keep things right even when the words are not perfect. This means that the way you are inside – the way you think, feel and act with care – matters more than only following the words that tell us what to do.

english_query: why different situations need different kinds of good character
ugf_response:
The person is saying three things. The first idea is that what is good to do can change when the world around you changes. They say that being a good person is not about doing the same thing every time. Instead, they say that being good means doing the right thing for the very one moment you are in. The second idea is what they think comes from this. They think that because the world is always changing, a good person must have many different ways of acting. One way of acting might be good when things are calm, but that same way might be bad when things are hard or make you feel fear. The third idea is whether their thinking is good.

To see if their thinking is good, we must look at how they build their case. The first part of their thinking is strong because it is true that the world changes. We know that being kind to a child is not the same as being kind to a person who wants to hurt you. The second part of their thinking is also strong. It makes sense that a person needs many different ways of being good to meet the many ways the world changes. However, we must be careful. If we say that what is good changes too much, we might lose the things that are always good. If there are no things that stay the same, then we might not know how to be a good person at all. We must find a way to have things that stay the same while also being able to change when the moment needs it.

english_query: Mayor Alden Voss genuinely believes his recent improvements guarantee safety, despite historical data showing the levee has failed in every flood over the past ten years. He focuses on the best‑case scenario (the levee holding) and discounts the base‑rate risk, leading him to postpone evacuation and reallocate rescue resources.
ugf_response: First, we look at the man who runs the town. He thinks his new work on the wall makes it safe. He wants to believe the wall will hold back the water. But we must look at what has happened before. For ten years, every time big water came, the wall broke. This is a strong way things have gone. The leader ignores this way things go. He only looks at the good thing that might happen. He does not look at the big chance that the bad thing will happen again. This is a wrong way to guess what will happen next. If you ignore the past, you might be wrong about the future. Someone might say the new work is different and better. Maybe it will work this time. But we do not know that for sure. We know the wall has failed many times. It is safer to trust the past way things go than to trust a hope. If he waits too long, people might get hurt or die. That is a big problem. Moving people out now is hard, but staying and being wrong is worse. So, he should not wait. He should move people to safe places. The leader is making a bad choice by ignoring the past times the wall broke. He should order people to leave now because the chance of the wall breaking again is very high.

english_query: And what from bad things and wrong acts? If you cannot answer right now, ask yourself where we go with the sick, and to whom we take them.
ugf_response: To the people who help the sick, old teacher.

english_query: how to pick the best choice when you are not sure what will happen
ugf_response: Please give me the words that you want me to look at. You have told me the ways I must write, but you have not yet given me the words or the ideas that I must break down. Once you give me the words that the person said, I will tell you the things they say are true. Then I will tell you what they think must happen because of those things. Last, I will tell you if their way of thinking is good or bad. I am ready to start when you are.

english_query: It looks like the teaching about god is not about giving reasons. For an old teacher of the church says: 'Put reasons to the side where trust is needed.' But in this teaching, trust is most needed: 'But these things are written that you may believe.' So the teaching about god is not about giving reasons.
ugf_response: Even though reasons from human thinking cannot show why we must take trust, still, this teaching uses things we trust to show other true things.

english_query: how to check if your own thinking has problems
ugf_response: First, you must look at what you think is true and ask if you are only seeing what you want to see. You might think something is true just because it makes you feel good or because it fits with what you already believe. Second, you must look for things that might show you are wrong. Instead of looking for ways to show you are right, you should look for ways to show you are wrong. Third, you should ask if your way of thinking stays the same even when you have new things that you know are true. If you only believe things that fit your old ways of thinking, then your thinking has a problem. The thing after the third thing is to talk to other people and ask them to tell you why you might be wrong. If you do not listen to them, you are not checking your thinking well. The thing after that is to look at how you get to your thoughts. You must see if the steps you take to get from one thought to the next are good. If the steps do not make sense, then the end thought is not good. Finally, you must be willing to change your mind when you find that you are wrong. If you cannot change, you cannot learn.

ugf_response: Thank you, friend; and I hope that you saw the well known teacher of speaking tell us to be serious, as the words, 'The person is the way to know all things,' were a big thing; and he said we were wrong to use a young one to talk, and said that the fear of the young one was made to hurt his point; he also said that we made fun of him.

english_query: Then my answer is, that they are not looked at at all.
ugf_response: How not looked at? Do they not have very big power in the groups of people?

If a man is found trying to take all power in a bad way and when found he is put on a board that hurts his eyes hurt and can not see and after many bad hurt and his family also hurt and at last he is put a stick in or cover with black stuff and set on fire will he be more happy than if he can run away and become the person who takes all power and keep all time doing what he wants and hold the control of the group that runs things and have people who want what he has and people who look up to him? Is that the question you say can not be shown wrong?

english_query: Focal points resolve the equilibrium‑selection problem in coordination games. When many matching outcomes exist, the most salient one—here the lighthouse at dawn—becomes the natural choice, leveraging shared expectations rather than explicit communication.
ugf_response: First, we look at a game where two people need to pick the same spot to meet. If there are many spots, it is hard to know which one the other person will pick. This is a hard problem because there is no way to talk to each other. Then, we see that some spots stand out more than others. A tall light house in the morning sky is very bright and easy to see. It is different from the other places. So, both people think, 'The other person will probably pick the bright light.' This shared thought helps them pick the same spot without talking. This special spot is a main point of attention. It helps fix the problem of choosing among many good choices. But someone might say, 'What if the other person picks a different spot that also stands out?' For one case, maybe the other person thinks the big old tree is more special. In that case, they fail to meet. So, the main point only works if both people see the same thing as special. Even so, in most cases, things like the middle of the day or a big building are so clear that most people agree on them. So, the idea holds up well for many situations. It shows how our brains use what is easy to see to work together. A main point of attention helps people agree on one choice when there are many choices, by using what stands out most to everyone. This works because people expect others to notice the same easy-to-see thing.

english_query: Also, the lower things get to god through the higher ones, as a man who knew much says. But since all the sky helpers are not the same, there is only one sky helper with no one between him and men. So there is only one sky helper who watches men right away.
ugf_response: As said before, all the sky helpers of the first group get light from god in some ways; but in other ways, only the higher ones get light from god right away, and they show it to the lower ones. This is also true for the lower groups: for a lower sky helper gets light from one of the highest in some ways, and in other ways from the one just above him. So it is possible that one sky helper lights up a man right away, and yet has other sky helpers below him whom he lights up.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response:
When you look at the world, you do not see everything at once. Instead, you see the world through a way of thinking that you already have inside your head. This way of thinking is made of all the things you think are true. These things you think are true act like a set of eyes that you cannot take off.

Think about it this way. Imagine you are wearing glasses that are a deep red color. When you look at a white wall, you will see a red wall. You do not think the wall is red, but your eyes tell you it is. Your glasses change what you see before the information even gets to your brain. Your old thoughts are like those glasses. They change how you see new things before you even have a chance to think about them.

First, your brain wants to save time and the power it needs to work. It is hard to look at every new thing as if it were completely new. It would take too much work. So, your brain looks at a new thing and asks, does this fit with what I already know? If the new thing fits well with your old thoughts, your brain says, yes, this is right, and you let it in easily. If the new thing does not fit, your brain feels a kind of trouble. It might even try to make the new thing look wrong so that your old thoughts stay the same.

Second, you only notice things that are the same as your old thoughts. If you think that all dogs are mean, and you see a new dog, your brain will look for ways that the dog is mean. You might see a dog moving its back part from side to side, but your brain will say, no, it is just doing that to make you think something that is not true. You will look for the bite or the loud sound a dog makes when it is mad because that is what you expect to see. You do not look for the good way a dog acts because your old thoughts told you it was not there.

Third, this makes it hard to learn things that go against what you believe. When you see something that shows your old thought is wrong, it feels bad. It feels like the world is not what you thought it was. To stop this bad feeling, many people will just say the new thing is not true. They will find a way to make the new thing fit into their old way of thinking, even if they have to bend it to make it work.

So, what you think now is the way you see what comes next. Your old thoughts act like a map. If your map says there is a river in a certain place, you will look for a river there. If you do not see one, you might think your eyes are bad, rather than thinking your map is wrong. To see the world as it really is, you must remember that you are wearing those colored glasses, and you must try to take them off.

english_query: Also, bad is the not having of right way, right kind, and right order. But bad is not the not having of all good. So what good really is is not made of right way, right kind, and right order.
ugf_response: Every thing is because of some shape. So, for every thing that a thing is, it has a right way, right kind, and right order. Like a man has a right way, right kind, and right order as he is white, good, and knows much; for every thing said about him. But bad takes away some part of being, like not seeing takes away the being of sight; yet it does not take away every right way, right kind, and right order, but only those that come with the being of sight.

english_query: Also, if a set place was needed for man to live, this need would come from either the soul or the body. If from the soul, the place would be in the sky, which fits the soul; since all want the sky. If from the body, there was no need for any place other than what other animals have. So the happy place was not fit for man to live in.
ugf_response: It is wrong to say any set place is right for the soul or any spirit, though a place may fit spirits in some way. For the earth happy place was fit for man, for both body and soul; that is, because in his soul was the power that kept the man body from going bad. This cannot be said of other animals. So, as an old teacher who knew much says: 'No animal that does not think lived in the happy place'; although, by a special choice, god brought animals there to the first man; and the bad animal could go there with the help of the bad spirit.

english_query:
The maximin rule looks at the worst (minimum) payoff for each possible act, then selects the act whose worst payoff is the highest. It is the pessimist's strategy: raise the floor, ignore the ceiling.

**Computation**:
- Mountain Pass: worst payoff = min(-5, 2, 8) = -5
- River Sail:   worst payoff = min(1, -6, 7) = -6
- Desert Trail: worst payoff = min(0, -2, 5) = -2

The highest of these minima is -2, belonging to the Desert Trail. Therefore, maximin recommends taking the Desert Trail.

A maximax agent would instead pick the route with the highest possible payoff (Mountain Pass, 8). Thus the two criteria diverge.
ugf_response: First, we look at the three ways to go and the bad things that might happen. For the mountain way, the worst thing is losing five. For the river way, the worst thing is losing six. For the dry land way, the worst thing is losing two. Next, we follow the way of thinking for a person who is worried. This way says to pick the choice where the worst thing is not so bad. We look at the worst parts: losing five, losing six, and losing two. Losing two is better than losing five or six. So, the dry land way is the safe pick. Then, we look at the other way to think, which is to pick the best possible thing. The mountain way has the best high number, eight. This shows that the two ways of thinking give different answers. One wants to stay safe, and the other wants to win big. The question asks what the first way picks. Since the dry land way has the best worst-case, it is the answer for that way. The way for a worried person picks the dry land way because it has the best thing that can happen in the worst case.

english_query: Assuming that majority rule always yields a coherent, transitive group preference is a common mistake. Condorcet's Paradox shows that even perfectly rational individuals can generate a collective cycle, allowing an agenda‑setter to dictate the winner.
ugf_response: First, we look at the idea that if most people agree, the group choice is clear. But we must check if this is always true. A known problem shows a case where three people pick from three things. Person one likes thing one more than thing two, and thing two more than thing three. Person two likes thing two more than thing three, and thing three more than thing one. Person three likes thing three more than thing one, and thing one more than thing two. If we pick between thing one and thing two, thing one wins. If we pick between thing two and thing three, thing two wins. But if we pick between thing three and thing one, thing three wins. So thing one beats thing two, thing two beats thing three, but thing three beats thing one. This is a circle. Because of this circle, the person who picks the order of picking can make any choice win. This means the group does not have one clear wish. The strong answer is that picking by the most can fail to give a single end choice. Some might say we can just pick a different way to choose to fix this. But a big idea says no perfect way is there for groups to pick one end choice from many picks without some bad part. So the wrong idea is thinking picking by the most is always safe and clear. It is not. Picking by the most does not always give a clear group choice because picks can form a circle. This lets the person setting the pick order control the end choice.

english_query: Each dollar contributed returns $0.375 to the contributor (1.5 multiplier divided by 4 players) but costs $1 to contribute. Because the marginal per‑capita return (MPCR) = 1.5/4 = 0.375 < 1, the dominant strategy is to contribute $0 – free‑ride on teammates. If everyone free‑rides, the fund is empty and each player keeps only the original $5,000. If everyone contributes the full $5,000, each ends up with $7,500, a Pareto improvement over universal free‑riding. This mirrors a multi‑player Prisoner's Dilemma.
ugf_response: First, we see each person can give some of their five groups of ten hundred of money. For each piece of money given they only get back 0.375 of money, which is less than the piece they gave. So the best thing for one person, if they think only about themselves, is to give nothing and keep their money. Next, if everyone does that the group ends with no extra money and each person keeps only the first five groups of ten hundred of money. Next, if everyone gives the full five groups of ten hundred of money, each person ends with seven groups of ten hundred and five groups of hundred of money, which is more than they first had, so all are more happy. Next, the problem is that each person wants the group to give, but also wants to keep their own money, so the safe thing is to give nothing even though the group would be more happy if all gave. Some may say that because the group can be more happy, people should trust others to give, but the chance that one does not give makes the safe thing to keep the money. The maybe choice for each person is to give nothing, because giving back less than you put makes it not safe, even though if everyone gave, all would have more.

english_query: when we have good reason to think a thing will or will not happen
ugf_response:
Sometimes we want to know if a thing will happen in the future. We do not know for sure because we cannot see the future. However, we can look at what is happening now and what has happened before to make a good guess. This is how we find out if a thing has a high chance to come to be or if it has a low chance to come to be.

First, we look at the things that are happening right now. We look at the way things move and the way things act. If we see that a ball is moving toward a wall, we can guess that it will hit the wall very soon. We do not need to see it hit the wall to know it is going to happen. We use what we see to make a guess about what will happen next.

Second, we look at what has happened many times before. If every time we drop a stone it falls to the ground, we can say we have a very good reason to think the next stone will also fall to the ground. We do not need to see the next stone fall to know it will happen, because it has happened every single time in the past. When something happens the same way over and over, we can trust that it will happen again.

Third, we must think about how much we know. If we have many pieces of information that all point to the same thing, our guess becomes strong. If we have only one small piece of information, our guess does not have much power. If we have many pieces of information that all say the same thing, we can feel very sure about what will happen.

We must also think about the things that could change. Sometimes, a new thing can happen that makes our guess wrong. If we think a stone will fall, but then someone catches it, our guess was wrong. We must always remember that our guess is not the same as knowing the truth for sure. We are only using what we know now to guess what will happen later. When we have many good reasons and many pieces of information that all point the same way, we say we have a very good reason to believe a thing will or will not happen.

english_query: The scholar smiles, "Exactly. The same 8,000 gold is a gain for those with a status‑quo reference and a loss for the one with a higher expectation. That's the essence of reference‑point effects."
ugf_response: First, we look at the words used by the learned person. He talks about gold money. He says the same pile of gold, eight big groups of a hundred, feels different to two kinds of people. One kind of person has a low hope. For them, getting this gold is a good thing. It is a win. The other kind of person has a high hope. They thought they would get more. So, getting this gold feels like a bad thing. It is a miss. This idea is about how we see things. It means we do not see good in a straight line. We see good by looking at what we expect. If we expect little, we are happy with more. If we expect much, we are sad with less. Now, let us think if this is always true. Maybe some people are just happy to get any gold. They do not care about the hope. But the learned person says this is the main way people feel. Most people look at where they started or what they thought they would get. This is a strong idea because it explains why people act strange with money. They might take a chance to avoid a miss, even if the numbers are the same. So, the key is the starting line in our mind. The answer is that our mind sets a line. If we are above it, we feel good. If we are below it, we feel bad. The gold is the same, but the feeling is not. The good of something comes from what we expect to get, not just the size of the pile. People feel a win if they get more than their hope, and a miss if they get less, even if the pile is the same.

english_query: why someone's character does not decide if their point is right
ugf_response:
Person number one: Why does it matter if a person is good or bad when they say something is true?

Person number two: It should not matter. A thing is true or not true by itself.

Person number one: But if a person is bad, can we trust what they say?

Person number two: You can look at what they say without looking at who they are. If a man who tells lies says that the sun is hot, the sun is still hot. The sun does not care if the man is bad.

Person number one: So you are saying that the truth stays the same even if a bad man says it?

Person number two: Yes. The truth rests on what is real in the world. It does not rest on the person who speaks.

Person number one: I see. But if we know a person is bad, we might think they are trying to make us believe something that is not true.

Person number two: That is true. You must be careful. But being careful about a person is not the same as saying what they said is wrong. You must look at the thing itself to see if it is right.

english_query: In the Guild Workshop's Strategy Hall, the player is summoned by Master Arin, the veteran tactician, to demonstrate understanding of the Centipede Game paradox.
ugf_response: First, we look at the game. Two people take turns. There is a pile of money. It gets bigger each time. The person with the turn can take the money or let the other person go. If they let the other person go, the pile grows. But if the other person takes it next, the first person gets less. We think about the end. The last person will take the money because it is more than nothing. So, the person before the last knows this. They will take the money now to get more than they would later. We go back to the start. The first person knows the second will take it if they pass. So the first person takes it right away. This is what the clear counting way says. But people do not do this. They pass. They hope the other person will pass too. If both pass, they get more money. The problem is that the clear counting way says stop early. Real life says keep going. The hard part is that if you trust the counting, you get less. If you trust the other person, you might get more. The hard thing is that the careful way to think makes you lose the big win. The game shows that the best way to count for one person leads to a small win for both, but waiting can lead to a big win if both trust each other. The hard part is that the sure way to be safe is not the way to get the most.

english_query: I wish that you would give me a same kind of answer for the letter that is like the first part of the word sea.
ugf_response: But how can any one, old teacher, tell the parts of a part? I can only say that the letter that is like the first part of the word sea is a letter that makes a sound like air going out; the letter that is like the first part of the word big and most other letters are not sounds from the mouth or just noise. english_query: why people fear losing more than they enjoy winning the same amount
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who has ten pieces of gold. If that person loses five pieces of gold, they will feel very, very bad. The hurt of losing those five pieces is very great. Now, imagine a different person who has nothing. If that person gets five pieces of gold, they will feel happy. But the happy feeling is not as great as the bad feeling from the first person. The bad feeling from losing is much bigger than the happy feeling from getting the very same number of things.

The hard question is why our minds work this way. Why does the hurt of losing something we have feel more strong than the happy feeling of getting something new? Why are we not even about the things we get and the things we lose?

Some people think this happens because of how we stay alive. In the old days, when people lived in the wild, losing food meant you might die. Getting extra food was good, but it did not stop you from dying right then. So, our minds learned to pay much more attention to things that could hurt us. We became very good at looking for things that take away what we have, because that keeps us alive.

Other people think this happens because of how we see the world. When we have something, it becomes part of who we are. It feels like it belongs to us. When it is gone, it feels like a part of us is gone. This makes the thing being gone feel much worse than just getting something that was not there before. We are not just losing a thing, we are losing a part of our life.

We cannot keep the act and the things that follow it away from each other. If we want to know if an act was right, we must look at the world after the act is done. We see if the world is better or if the world is worse. If we only look at what we thought at the start, we are not seeing the whole truth. The truth of an act is found in the way it changes things. Because of this, what happens after you act is a part of the act itself. If the end of your act is bad, then the act cannot be called good. Many people wonder what makes a thing good or bad to do. Some people think that certain things are always bad, like telling a lie, no matter what happens. Other people think that we should look at what happens after we do something to decide if it was a good thing.

When we have to make a choice, we look at all the things we could do. For each thing we could do, we try to see how much good it will bring and how much bad it will bring. We look at all the people who will be touched by what we do. We count the good and we count the bad.

The idea says that the best thing to do is the one that has the most good left over after we take away the bad. If one choice brings a little bit of good to ten people, and another choice brings a lot of good to only one person, we must look at the whole thing when we put them all together. We want the whole thing of being happy and being well in the body in the world to be as big as it can be.

This way of thinking means that we do not just look at our own feeling of being happy. We look at everyone. We try to act in a way that makes the whole world a better place by adding as much good as we can. We do not look at what we should do because of old ways of thinking. Instead, we look at what will actually happen and try to make the best thing that comes from it for the most people.

english_query: why sometimes a good enough answer is better than the best answer

The second idea is that there is a point where the extra work you do does not give you much more help. If you spend ten hours to get an answer that is ten times better than a one hour answer, you might be using up your life for nothing. The third idea is that if you stop when the answer is good enough, you can use that extra time to do other things that help.

The person thinks that because of these ideas, it is often better to pick a good enough answer instead of the best one. They think that if you want to use your time and your power in a way that shows you know how to live well, you should stop looking for the best answer once you have one that works well. Now we must look at if the thinking is good. The thinking is good in many ways. It is true that time and power are things we do not have in large numbers. If we spend all our time on one thing to make it perfect, we will never do anything else. This is a very good way to look at life. However, there is a way the thinking could be bad. If the thing you are doing is very important, like keeping people safe, then a good enough answer might not be enough. In some cases, you must find the very best answer or people will get hurt. So, the thinking is good most of the time, but it rests on what kind of thing you are working on.

To these people, there is no way to ask a question that is free of its own shape.

We see this when we ask about things that are good or bad. If you ask if a thing is good, the person will look for good things. If you ask if a thing is bad, they will look for bad things. The question itself acts like a light that only shows one part of the room. It does not show the whole room. It only shows what the light hits. This makes it very hard to see the whole truth.

english_query: what it means to live a good life by being a good person
ugf_response:
First, we think about what it means to be a good person. A good person tries to do things that give help to other people and does not do things that hurt them. A good person also tries to be kind and to act toward people in the same way and to keep promises. When you try to do these things, you start to feel good inside and other people also feel good around you. That feeling of good inside and the feeling of other people being safe and happy is what many people call a good life.  

Second, we look at how a good life feels. A good life is not just about having a lot of stuff or money. It is more about feeling that your days have a sense and that you can look at the world and see that you have made a small part of it better. It is also about having friends and family that you can trust and that you can trust back. When you act in a kind way, you make more time for these friends to grow.  

Third, we think about how to stay being this kind of person. This means checking each day if you have done something that hurts or gives help. If you see a hurt, you try to fix it or say sorry. If you see a time to give help, you take it. You also try to listen to other people and to put yourself in their place so you can see what they need.  

Finally, when you keep doing these things, the feeling of good inside and the feeling of other people being safe and happy keep growing. This makes you feel that you are living a good life. In short, living a good life by being a good person is about trying each day to be kind, to act toward people in the same way, and to give help, and letting that shape how you feel and how the world around you feels.

english_query: the idea that the right thing to do is what leads to the most good
ugf_response:
When we think about what to do, we first look at the act itself. An act is something a person does. After an act, things can happen to other people. Some of those things make people feel happy, safe, or have what they need. We can call those things good. Other things can make people feel sad, hurt, or miss what they need. Those we call not good.  

To decide which act is the right one, we can count how many of the good things happen because of the act. If one act makes many people feel happy, safe, or have food, and another act only makes a few people feel that way, the first act makes more good. The idea we are talking about says that the right act is the one that makes the most good for the most people.  

First, we look at one act we think about. Then we think about what will happen after the act. We ask: will this act cause many good things or only a few? We also ask: will it cause any not good things? If the act brings a lot of good and little or no not good, it is the right choice. If another act brings less good or more not good, it is not the right choice.  

In short, the way to know what the right thing to do is to imagine what will happen later after each act we think about and see which later time has the most good. The act that leads to that later time is the one we should pick. This way we try to help as many people as we can and make the world a place where more people feel happy and safe.

english_query: Also, the telling of times and days started on the first day. So the lights were not made to tell times and days and years.
ugf_response: The big break of time into day and night happened on the first day, about the moving of the sky that is for all the sky and could have started then. But the small telling of days and times and years, like one day being hotter than another, or one time being different from another, comes from the moving of the stars: and this moving could have started on the day after the third one.

english_query: how we come to trust what other people tell us
ugf_response: First, we look at how we know if a thing is true. We see it with our eyes or feel it with our hands. This makes us feel sure about that thing. Second, we see that other people say the same thing that we see. When many people say the same thing, we start to think they might be right. Third, we look at the person who is talking to us. We ask if this person knows a lot about the thing they are saying. We also ask if this person wants us to believe them so they can get something for themselves. If the person has no reason to lie and they know much about the thing, we feel more sure. The thing after the third thing, we see if what they say is like what we already know to be true. If what they say is the same as what we know, we believe it more easily. If it is something very strange and new, we wait and look for more signs. The thing after the thing after the third thing, we look at the way they speak. If they seem to be telling the truth and do not change their story, we feel we can trust their words. Finally, we put all these things together to decide if we will believe what they say.

english_query: when one person doing something first changes what others do
ugf_response:
Imagine a group of people who are all standing in a big room. At the start, every person is doing the same thing. Maybe they are all sitting still, or maybe they are all walking in a slow way. Then, one person decides to change what they are doing. This person might start to run, or they might sit down on the ground. As soon as this person changes, the other people in the room look at them. Because they see this change, they might also change what they are doing. They might start to run too, or they might all sit down. The first person has changed the way the whole group acts.

The hard question here is about why this happens and if it is a good or bad thing. We want to know if people change because they want to be like the first person, or if they change because they think the first person knows something they do not know. We also want to know if this makes the group better or if it makes the group act in a way that is not good for them.

Some people might say that this is a good way for a group to learn. They think that if one person finds a new and better way to do something, the rest of the group can follow and do better too. In this way, the group becomes more able to think well and act well because one person was able to change. They believe that looking at what others do helps us find the best way to live and work.

Other people might say that this is a bad way for a group to act. They think that if everyone just follows the first person, then no one is thinking for themselves. If the first person does something that is not right, then everyone will do that same wrong thing. This can lead to a situation where a whole group of people does something that is not good, just because they saw one person do it first. They think that true deep knowing comes from thinking on your own, not just doing what you see others doing.

english_query: the idea that we are all connected and need each other
ugf_response:
Person 1: I hear people say we all need each other. What does that mean?  
Person 2: It means that each of us is like a part of a big group and we help each other to live.  
Person 1: How can we see that we are like parts of a big group?  
Person 2: Look at how we share food, water, and care. When one is sick, others bring help.  
Person 1: But sometimes I feel alone. How does that fit?  
Person 2: Even when you feel alone, there are still people who care, even if you do not see them yet.  
Person 1: So we should try to help others?  
Person 2: Yes, when we give help we also get help back. It makes life easier for all.  
Person 1: Is there a way to make this feeling stronger?  
Person 2: You can spend time with friends, talk, share, and listen. That builds the sense that we are all together.

english_query: how a person can change who they are by changing what they do
ugf_response:
Person one: I want to be a better person. How can I do this?

Person two: You can change who you are by changing the things you do every day.

Person one: But I feel like I am just the way I am. Can doing things really change my heart or my mind?

Person two: Yes. When you do something many times, it becomes a part of you. If you act like a kind person, you will start to feel like a kind person.

Person one: So if I want to stop being a person who is always angry, I should try to act calm instead?

Person two: That is right. If you choose to act in a calm way, your mind will begin to follow. The things you do lead to the way you think.

Person one: Does it take a long time to see this change?

Person two: It takes a long time. You must do the new things many, many times before they feel easy and real.

Person one: So the things I do are like the small things you put in the ground that grow into something big?

Person two: Yes. The things you do are the ways you build yourself. If you build with good things, you will become a good person.

english_query: how to tell when someone is changing what was really said
ugf_response:
When one person says some words and later another person says those words again but with a small change, we have to try to tell if the words have been moved or changed. The first person may have spoken in a quiet place, and the second person may be in a loud place, so the sound of the words can be hard to hear the same. We may hear only part of the first set of words, and the second set may have extra parts that were not there before. The hard question is how we can know if the second set of words is the same as the first, or if it has been changed a little or a lot, even when we cannot go back and hear the first one again.

One thought is to ask the first speaker to say the words again. If the first speaker can say the same words again in the same order, we have a sign that the second speaker has not changed much. Another thought is to have a note of the first words. If we can look at the note and see the same words, we can check if the second speaker has added or taken away any. Some people say that the way the voice sounds can also give a sign. A soft way of talking may hide a change, while a strong way of talking may make a change stand out. Others say that the way the words fit together, the order of the words, can help us see if something has been moved. If the order feels off, it may be a sign that the words have been changed.

Different people give different replies because they trust different ways. Some trust the ear and say that listening very close and asking for a repeat is the best way. Others trust the note and say that a note is the safest way to keep the words the same. Some think that the feeling behind the words matters, so they look at whether the feeling seems the same as before. They may say that if the feeling is not the same, then the words have been changed in meaning, even if the sounds look the same. Still others think that the group of people who heard the first set of words can all talk about what they heard, and if most of them say the same thing, then the second set of words is probably a good repeat. Each reply comes from a different way of looking at the problem, and each way has a reason that makes sense to the person who uses it. The whole problem stays a hard question because we do not always have a perfect way to catch every little change, and we have to decide which way to trust in each case.

english_query: how to find the hidden parts of someone's case
ugf_response: First, we must understand what we want to find. We want to know the things about a person that they do not show to the world. Second, we must look at what they do every day. We watch how they act when they think no one is looking. Third, we look at the things they say when they are not trying to look good. We listen for the small things they say that are not the same as what they do. Next, we look at the things they own and the places they go. These things can tell us about what they really care about. After that, we must be very careful not to believe everything we see at first. We must think about why they might want to hide certain things. We must ask if what we see is real or if it is something they made to make us think something that is not true. Finally, we put all these pieces together to see the whole picture of who they are.

english_query: Also, what is and what can be are not different in things that last forever, and even less so in God. But it is possible for the good spirit to be different from the Son, even if He did not come from Him. For a good old teacher says: 'The Son and the good spirit get their being from the Father; but each in a different way; one by being born, the other by going out, so they are different from each other.' And he says later: 'For even if there were no other reason for the Son and the good spirit to be different, this alone would be enough.' So the good spirit is different from the Son, without coming from Him.
ugf_response: The good spirit is different from the Son because where one comes from is different from where the other comes from; but this being different in where they come from is because the Son is only from the Father, while the good spirit is from the Father and the Son; for if this were not so, the ways they come would not be different from each other, as was said before.

english_query: Also, all things want their end. But not all things want god, because not all even know him. So god is not the end of all things.
ugf_response: All things want god as their end when they want some good thing, whether this want is in the mind or in the senses or in how things grow, meaning without knowing; because nothing is good and wanted unless it has some of the look of god.

english_query: If she takes the medicine, then her headache goes away. She takes the medicine. Therefore, her headache goes away. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First we see a line that says if she takes the thing you take to feel good then the pain in her head stops. That means the first part is that she takes the thing you take to feel good and the second part is that the pain in her head stops. Next we see another line that says she takes the thing you take to feel good. So the first part of the if then is true. When the first part of an if then is true, the second part has to be true. Because we already know the first part is true, we can say the second part is true. That second part says the pain in her head stops. So the last line is true every time the first two are true. So the last line happens for sure. follows

english_query: Also, the things in the sky are better than things on the ground. But the human body is the best; because it has the best shape, which is the part that can think. So it should be made from sky things, not ground things.
ugf_response: Even though sky things are better in themselves than ground things, they are not good for what the thinking part does. The thinking part gets truth through the senses, and the parts that sense cannot be made of sky things which do not change. Also, it is not true that some of the sky stuff goes into the body, as some say who think the mind joins to the body by light. First, they are wrong that light is a body. Second, it cannot happen that something from the sky stuff joins with the ground parts, because sky things do not change; so they do not go into bodies made of many parts, except by their power.

english_query: And to whom do we go with the ones who do wrong and do not stop?
ugf_response: To the ones who decide right and wrong, you mean.
